title: aster novi-belgii var. floribundus
intro: Aster novi-belgii var. floribundus, commonly known as New York aster, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Aster novi-belgii var. floribundus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
